title: Horror$Place Style Contract Schema v1
description: Schema for defining art and narrative styles, including constraints, evidence types, and metric impacts, compliant with the Rivers of Blood Charter.

style_id.description: Unique identifier for the style contract.

description.description: Detailed description of the style's aesthetic and thematic elements.

tier.description: Safety tier as defined by the Rivers of Blood Charter.

platforms.description: List of supported platforms (e.g., web, vr, bci).

evidence_types.description: List of acceptable evidence types this style emphasizes (e.g., spectral_static, archival_ledger).

forbidden_depictions.description: List of explicitly forbidden visual or narrative elements that violate the Rivers of Blood Charter.

metric_levers.description: Defines how this style influences entertainment metrics.

invariant_requirements.description: Minimum or preferred invariant values this style is designed for.
